tagline: Leverage Universal Commits for Marketplace purchases.
what_it_does: Databricks users can now utilize up to 10% of their Universal Commits to purchase eligible third-party partner products through the Databricks Marketplace. This feature enhances the purchasing flexibility for customers, allowing them to acquire various data assets, including datasets, AI models, and notebooks, directly from the Marketplace. The integration with OpenSharing ensures secure transactions and access to a wide range of partner offerings.
why_it_matters: This update significantly enhances the value of Universal Commits by allowing organizations to invest in third-party solutions that can improve their data capabilities and analytics. By facilitating easier access to partner products, businesses can accelerate their data-driven initiatives, optimize costs, and enhance productivity through the use of specialized tools and datasets.
plain_summary: Databricks users can now utilize up to 10% of their Universal Commits to purchase eligible third party partner products through the Databricks Marketplace. This feature enhances the purchasing flexibility for customers, allowing them to acquire various data…

capabilities.title: Universal Commits Usage
capabilities.desc: Allows up to 10% of Universal Commits to be used for purchasing Marketplace partner products.

capabilities.title: Diverse Product Offerings
capabilities.desc: Access a variety of data assets, including datasets, notebooks, and AI models from the Marketplace.

capabilities.title: Secure Transactions
capabilities.desc: Utilizes OpenSharing for secure data exchange and transactions within the Marketplace.

capabilities.title: Partner Connect Integration
capabilities.desc: Simplifies connections to partner solutions directly from the Databricks UI.

prerequisites: Databricks account with Universal Commits enabled.
use_cases: Organizations seeking to enhance their analytics capabilities with third-party datasets.
Data teams looking to leverage AI models from trusted partners.
Businesses wanting to streamline access to partner solutions through Databricks.
limitations: Only eligible third-party partner products can be purchased.
A maximum of 10% of Universal Commits can be utilized.

steps.title: Access Databricks Marketplace
steps.desc: Navigate to the Marketplace from your Databricks workspace.

steps.title: Browse Offerings
steps.desc: Explore available partner products and data assets.

steps.title: Select Products
steps.desc: Choose eligible products you wish to purchase.

steps.title: Utilize Universal Commits
steps.desc: Apply up to 10% of your Universal Commits towards the purchase.

steps.title: Complete Transaction
steps.desc: Follow the prompts to finalize your purchase.

key_takeaway: Users can now leverage Universal Commits to purchase third-party products, enhancing their data capabilities and driving business value.
